image-compressor.title: Image Compressor
image-compressor.description: Compress images online for free without losing quality.
image-compressor.meta_title: Free Image Compressor Online — Sohelix Tools
image-compressor.meta_description: Reduce image file size instantly with this free browser-based image compressor. No uploads required.

faqs.q: What does the Image Compressor do?
faqs.a: This tool reduces the file size of your images while maintaining visual quality. It processes everything directly in your browser — no server uploads needed.

faqs.q: Is this tool free to use?
faqs.a: Yes, the Image Compressor is completely free. You can compress unlimited images without creating an account or paying anything.

faqs.q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
faqs.a: No. All image compression happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy.

faqs.q: Is this tool safe and secure?
faqs.a: Yes. Since the tool runs entirely in your browser using client-side JavaScript, your images remain private and are never transmitted over the internet.

faqs.q: Which devices and browsers are supported?
faqs.a: This tool works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Safari on both desktop and mobile devices.

faqs.q: Is this tool free to use?
faqs.a: Yes, completely free with no limits.

faqs.q: Are my data uploaded to a server?
faqs.a: No. All calculations happen locally in your browser. Your financial data is never transmitted.

faqs.q: Is this tool safe and secure?
faqs.a: Yes. The tool runs entirely client-side, keeping your financial information private.

faqs.q: Which devices and browsers are supported?
faqs.a: This tool works on modern browsers such as Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Safari on desktop and mobile devices.
